base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of cheep_cheep_swim — a character from 1985 super mario bros. underwater swimming fish. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame tail-flap cycle — underwater swimming fish; red (fast) + gray (slow) palette variants
